sections.paragraph:
νέϰρωσις, εως, ἡ [νεκρόω]

—1. ‘process of putting to death’, of Jesus’ execution in its various stages death Ro 4:19. By ext.

—2. ‘condition of being debilitated’, in physical sense deadness, mortification, of an unproductive womb 2 Cor 4:10; in spiritual/moral sense Mk 3:5 v.l.
